elements.title: lang::report_page_071_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT kbi_fd.id,
       kbi_c.id                                                             AS courseid,
       kbi_c.fullname                                                       AS course_name,
       kbi_f.name                                                           AS forum,
       kbi_fd.name                                                          AS discusion,
       kbi_u.id                                                             AS userid,
       kbi_u.firstname,
       kbi_u.lastname,
       MIN(kbi_fp.created)                                                  AS time_started,
       MIN(stat.students_accesed)                                       AS students_accesed,
       MIN(stat.timespend)                                              AS timespend,
       COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN kbi_fp.parent > 0 THEN kbi_fp.id ELSE NULL END) AS posts
FROM mdl_forum kbi_f
       JOIN mdl_forum_discussions kbi_fd ON kbi_fd.forum = kbi_f.id
       JOIN mdl_user kbi_u ON kbi_u.id = kbi_fd.userid
       JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_c.id = kbi_f.course
       LEFT JOIN mdl_forum_posts kbi_fp ON kbi_fp.discussion = kbi_fd.id
       JOIN mdl_modules kbi_m ON kbi_m.name = 'forum'
       JOIN mdl_course_modules kbi_cm ON kbi_cm.instance = kbi_f.id AND kbi_cm.module = kbi_m.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_lit.param                  AS module,
                         COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_lit.userid) AS students_accesed,
                         SUM(kbi_lit.timespend)         AS timespend
                  FROM mdl_context kbi_ctx
                         JOIN mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra ON kbi_ra.contextid = kbi_ctx.id
                         LEFT JOIN mdl_local_kopere_bi_tracking kbi_lit
                           ON kbi_lit.page = 'module' AND kbi_lit.courseid = kbi_ctx.instanceid AND kbi_lit.userid = kbi_ra.userid
                  WHERE kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
                    AND kbi_ra.roleid = 5
                  GROUP BY kbi_lit.param) stat ON stat.module = kbi_cm.id
WHERE kbi_f.id > 0
  AND kbi_f.course = :courseid
GROUP BY kbi_fd.id, kbi_c.id, kbi_f.name, kbi_u.id
